title: Dev Radar
description: A daily scan of GitHub, Hugging Face, Hacker News, ML papers, Kaggle, and itch.io, ranked for what the lab cares about.
sources: GitHub · Hugging Face · Hacker News · Papers · arXiv · Kaggle · itch.io

title: Geospatial Radar
description: A daily sweep of the geospatial world: mapping news, new QGIS plugins, library releases, fresh geodata, and the OSM ecosystem.
sources: Maps Mania · Geography Realm · QGIS · GitHub releases · GIS SE · NASA · Data.gov · weeklyOSM

title: Soccer Radar
description: Soccer news, transfer talk, and live scores across the Premier League, La Liga, MLS, and the Champions League.

title: Stocks Radar
description: Trending tickers, biggest movers, and social buzz from public market data. Signals to research — not financial advice.

title: Politics Radar
description: The day's reporting from the progressive press and accountability newsrooms.
sources: Guardian · Mother Jones · The Nation · ProPublica · The Intercept · Common Dreams
